features: 【High Quality】: Elastic hair bands are made of premium quality rubber and nylon material with good elasticity, stretch, and permeability. Small hair bands have soft and comfortable hand feeling and a durable rubber band.

【Mini Hair Clips】: The hair clips are made of durable plastic and metal materials, high quality, not easy to break, and can be used for a long time. Small and delicate, hair clips are perfect for creating fancy hairstyles.

【Multi-color hair ties】: 200 pcs multi-color hair ties, different colors are available for you to spare or replace, different colors are suitable for most types of clothes, very suitable for daily wear.

【Easy to Use】: Easy and convenient to put on and take off, just wrap these elastics around your hair to create an elegant ponytail. The headband is very lightweight and can be easily carried anywhere without being bulky.

【Good DIY accessory】: you can use the women hair band to DIY some beautiful bowknot band, lace band; Wrap the black elastic tie with flower cloth。They are very suitable for everyday makeup, with a variety of hairstyles, curly hair, straight hair, ponytail.
description: Product Description Features 1. 200 pieces are enough for a family. You can use it to hold your ponytail, pigtail and bun. 2. They can be applied multiple times, still maintains flexibility, and can stretch easily and resume quickly. 3. Comes with multi-color mini hair clips, small and delicate and cute, will not pull the hair. 4. Rubber and Nylon material, very soft, easy to use, will not pull the scalp. 5. Variety of colors, easy to match daily clothes. 6. The elastic hair band has strong elasticity and can hold the hair tightly. 7. Perfect for DIY all kinds of beautiful hair bands with it. When not tying a hairband, you can wear it as a bracelet on your hand. Mini Hair Clips - Cute clips with mini size are suitable for kids, girls and women. - Durable and stylish hair clips are easy to match with your clothes, hair color, makeup and hairstyles. - Hair clips are not only good for holding your hair daily life, but also perfect to style your hair to make your kids, girls and you more charming and attractive.
